name: iambacon-style-guide
description: CSS and style guide for iambacon.co.uk

scripts.clean:docs-source: node scripts/clean.mjs docs/assets/css/style.css docs/assets/css/style.css.map docs/assets/css/styleguide.css docs/assets/css/styleguide.css.map
scripts.css:build: npm run clean:css && npm run css:compile && npm run css:postcss && node scripts/cache-bust.mjs --base dist/css --assets . --separator -
scripts.postcss:watch: postcss docs/assets/css/style.css docs/assets/css/styleguide.css --base docs/assets/css --dir docs/assets/css --map --use autoprefixer --watch
scripts.docs:css:dev: sass --no-source-map src/sass/style.scss docs/assets/css/style.css && npm run styleguide:compile && postcss docs/assets/css/style.css docs/assets/css/styleguide.css --replace --map --use autoprefixer
scripts.docs:css: npm run clean:docs-source && sass --no-source-map src/sass/style.scss docs/assets/css/style.css && npm run styleguide:compile && postcss docs/assets/css/style.css docs/assets/css/styleguide.css --replace --no-map --use autoprefixer --use cssnano
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:css && npm run clean:docs && npm run docs:eleventy && npm run docs:cache-bust && npm run docs:zip
scripts.check: npm run css:build && npm run docs:build && npm audit

author: Colin Bacon
